---
title: "About Lucas Borges"
format: html
---

# About Lucas Borges

> Data Scientist | Machine Learning Engineer | Data Analyst

---

## Who am I?

Hello! My name is Lucas Borges, I'm passionate about transforming data into valuable insights and building intelligent solutions with machine learning. With a background in Data Science and hands-on experience in real-world projects, I'm dedicated to creating predictive models that solve complex problems.

---

## Technical Skills

::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Programming Languages</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>Python</span>
  <span>R</span>
  <span>SQL</span>
  <span>JavaScript</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Machine Learning</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>scikit-learn</span>
  <span>PyTorch</span>
  <span>TensorFlow</span>
  <span>XGBoost</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Data Science</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>Pandas</span>
  <span>Numpy</span>
  <span>Matplotlib</span>
  <span>Seaborn</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Visualization</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>Plotly</span>
  <span>Bokeh</span>
  <span>Tableau</span>
  <span>Power BI</span>
</div>
:::
:::

---

## Projects and Experience

### Kaggle Competition 2
> **Status**: Completed | **Skills**: Deep Learning, Ensemble Methods, Feature Engineering
> **Description**: Developed an advanced market prediction system using deep learning models and ensemble techniques

### Other Projects
- **Predictive Analytics**: Forecasting models for different domains
- **Data Processing**: Cleaning and transformation of large datasets
- **Interactive Visualization**: Dashboards and interactive reports

---

## Work Philosophy

I believe that well-treated data and well-built models can transform businesses. My focus is on:

- **Quality**: Clean and well-documented code
- **Performance**: Efficient and scalable models
- **Impact**: Solutions that generate real value

---

## Contact

Let's talk about how data science can help your project or business!

<div class="contact-buttons">
  <a href="mailto:lucasborges7007@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">
    Send Email
  </a>
  <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/lucasborgess" class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank">
    LinkedIn
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/lucasborges4" class="btn btn-outline" target="_blank">
    GitHub
  </a>
</div>

<style>
.skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.skill-category {
    background: #e8f4f8;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}

.skill-category:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.skill-category h4 {
    color: #4a5568;
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.skills {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    max-height: 200px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 0.25rem;
    margin: -0.25rem;
}

.skills span {
    background: #9ae6b4;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #22543d;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin: 0.125rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.skills span:hover {
    background: #48bb78;
    color: white;
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.contact-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 2rem;
}

.contact-buttons .btn {
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    display: inline-block;
}

.contact-buttons .btn-primary {
    background: #9ae6b4;
    color: #22543d;
}

.contact-buttons .btn-primary:hover {
    background: #48bb78;
    color: white;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(72,187,120,0.3);
}

.contact-buttons .btn-secondary {
    background: #e2e8f0;
    color: #4a5568;
}

.contact-buttons .btn-secondary:hover {
    background: #cbd5e0;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.contact-buttons .btn-outline {
    background: transparent;
    border: 2px solid #9ae6b4;
    color: #9ae6b4;
}

.contact-buttons .btn-outline:hover {
    background: #9ae6b4;
    color: #22543d;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
}

/* Responsive Design */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .skills-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    
    .contact-buttons {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
    }
    
    .contact-buttons .btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
        text-align: center;
    }
}
</style>
